index.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang='en'>
<head>
<meta charset='UTF-8'>
<title>Endless Runner</title>
<style>*{margin:0;padding:0}body{background:#0a0010;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;height:100vh}canvas{display:block;cursor:pointer}</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id='c' width='600' height='300'></canvas>
<script>
const cv=document.getElementById('c'),ctx=cv.getContext('2d');
const W=600,H=300,GY=250,PX=80;
let player,cacti,stars1,stars2,score,speed,dead,highScore,frame;
function makeStars(n,layers){
  const arr=[];
  for(let i=0;i<n;i++)arr.push({x:Math.random()*W,y:Math.random()*(GY-20)});
  return arr;
}
function init(){
  player={y:GY,vy:0,onGround:true,legT:0};
  cacti=[];
  stars1=makeStars(40);stars2=makeStars(25);
  score=0;speed=4;dead=false;frame=0;
  highScore=parseInt(localStorage.getItem('erHigh')||'0');
  spawnCactus(W+100);
}
function spawnCactus(startX){
  const h=40+Math.floor(Math.random()*41);
  cacti.push({x:startX,h:h,w:22});
}
function jump(){
  if(player.onGround&&!dead){
    player.vy=-11;player.onGround=false;
  }
}
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key===' '){e.preventDefault();if(dead){init();}else{jump();}}});
cv.addEventListener('click',()=>{if(dead)init();else jump();});
function update(){
  frame++;
  score++;
  if(score%500===0&&speed<12)speed+=0.5;
  player.vy+=0.55;
  player.y+=player.vy;
  if(player.y>=GY){player.y=GY;player.vy=0;player.onGround=true;}
  if(player.onGround)player.legT+=0.25;else player.legT=0;
  cacti.forEach(c=>{c.x-=speed;});
  const last=cacti[cacti.length-1];
  if(last&&last.x<W-(200+Math.random()*200))spawnCactus(W+20);
  cacti=cacti.filter(c=>c.x>-50);
  stars1.forEach(s=>{s.x-=0.3;if(s.x<0)s.x=W;});
  stars2.forEach(s=>{s.x-=0.7;if(s.x<0)s.x=W;});
  cacti.forEach(c=>{
    const py=player.y,pr=10;
    if(PX+pr>c.x&&PX-pr<c.x+c.w&&py-30<GY&&py>GY-c.h){
      dead=true;
      if(score>highScore){highScore=score;localStorage.setItem('erHigh',highScore);}
    }
  });
}
function drawBg(){
  const g=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,GY);
  g.addColorStop(0,'#0a0018');g.addColorStop(0.6,'#1a0030');g.addColorStop(1,'#2a0050');
  ctx.fillStyle=g;ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,GY);
}
function drawStars(){
  stars1.forEach(s=>{
    const twinkle=0.4+0.3*Math.sin(Date.now()*0.001+s.x);
    ctx.fillStyle=`rgba(180,180,255,${twinkle})`;ctx.fillRect(s.x,s.y,1,1);
  });
  stars2.forEach(s=>{
    const twinkle=0.7+0.3*Math.sin(Date.now()*0.002+s.y);
    ctx.fillStyle=`rgba(220,220,255,${twinkle})`;ctx.fillRect(s.x,s.y,2,2);
  });
}
function drawGround(){
  ctx.fillStyle='#4a3010';ctx.fillRect(0,GY,W,H-GY);
  ctx.fillStyle='#5a3a14';ctx.fillRect(0,GY,W,4);
}
function drawPlayer(){
  const x=PX,y=player.y;
  const leg1=Math.sin(player.legT)*12,leg2=-leg1;
  ctx.strokeStyle='#eee';ctx.lineWidth=2.5;
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(x,y-32,7,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.stroke();
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x,y-25);ctx.lineTo(x,y-10);ctx.stroke();
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x,y-22);ctx.lineTo(x-8,y-14);ctx.stroke();
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x,y-22);ctx.lineTo(x+8,y-14);ctx.stroke();
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x,y-10);ctx.lineTo(x-5+leg1*0.4,y+leg1);ctx.stroke();
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x,y-10);ctx.lineTo(x+5+leg2*0.4,y+leg2);ctx.stroke();
  ctx.fillStyle='#eee';
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(x,y-32,7,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
  ctx.fillStyle='#222';ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(x+3,y-34,1.5,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
}
function drawCacti(){
  cacti.forEach(c=>{
    ctx.fillStyle='#1a7a1a';
    ctx.fillRect(c.x,GY-c.h,c.w,c.h);
    ctx.fillStyle='#22aa22';
    ctx.fillRect(c.x+2,GY-c.h,c.w-4,6);
    const armH=Math.floor(c.h*0.45);
    ctx.fillStyle='#1a7a1a';
    ctx.fillRect(c.x-10,GY-armH-10,10,18);
    ctx.fillRect(c.x+c.w,GY-armH-8,10,18);
    ctx.fillRect(c.x-10,GY-armH-10,18,8);
    ctx.fillRect(c.x+c.w-8,GY-armH-8,18,8);
  });
}
function drawHUD(){
  ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.35)';ctx.fillRect(0,H-32,W,32);
  ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='bold 14px monospace';ctx.textAlign='left';
  ctx.fillText('Score: '+score,10,H-12);
  ctx.textAlign='right';
  ctx.fillStyle='#ffd700';ctx.fillText('Best: '+highScore,590,H-12);
  ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.3)';ctx.font='10px monospace';ctx.textAlign='center';
  ctx.fillText('SPACE or click to jump',W/2,H-12);
}
function draw(){
  drawBg();
  drawStars();
  drawGround();
  drawCacti();
  drawPlayer();
  drawHUD();
  if(dead){
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.7)';ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    ctx.fillStyle='#ff4455';ctx.font='bold 44px monospace';ctx.textAlign='center';
    ctx.fillText('GAME OVER',W/2,110);
    ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='20px monospace';
    ctx.fillText('Score: '+score,W/2,155);
    ctx.fillStyle='#ffd700';ctx.fillText('Best: '+highScore,W/2,185);
    ctx.fillStyle='#aaa';ctx.font='14px monospace';
    ctx.fillText('Press SPACE to restart',W/2,230);
  }
}
function loop(){if(!dead)update();draw();requestAnimationFrame(loop);}
init();loop();
</script>
</body>
</html>
